title: Pass & Play Pro tier now available
summary: We've launched our Pro tier with unlimited voice rooms, custom roles, and priority support. Perfect for growing communities.

title: Mobile app beta opens
summary: Our lightweight mobile-first app is now in open beta. Test it on iOS and Android and share your feedback.

title: Threaded conversations are here
summary: Threaded chat is now live for all plans. Keep discussions clear without losing context.

title: Event scheduling built in
summary: Schedule events and meetups directly in your space. No more juggling external calendars.

title: Privacy and data controls
summary: New privacy dashboard lets community owners control data retention and export. We put you in charge.

title: Welcome to Pass & Play
summary: We're live. Pass & Play is a Discord-like space focused on clarity, onboarding, and performance. Join the waitlist.
